title: The Crew Reaches Robin
description: Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this part follows Spandam, Luffy, Nico Robin, Nami, Sanji. Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: We'll defend this door to our death!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They have good luck, don't they?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Now we have permission to kill.

summary: Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.
